creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Don Lewis from comment #45)
> Created attachment 166861 [details]
> updated patch to upgrade to boost 1.60 (and also add long double support for
> recent FreeBSD)
> 
> Fix boost-docs pkg-plist.
> 
> Strip lib/libboost_python.so.

Don, with the lastest patch on 10-amd64:
